name: Telegram Bot API
description: Telegram Bot API enables building bots to send messages, photos, documents, videos, locations, manage chats, handle updates via polling or webhooks, and process callback queries.

auth.description: Bot token is included in the URL path as /bot{token}/method

capabilities.name: get_me
capabilities.description: Get basic information about the bot.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a text message to a chat with optional formatting and keyboards.

capabilities.name: send_photo
capabilities.description: Send a photo to a chat.

capabilities.name: send_document
capabilities.description: Send a document or file to a chat.

capabilities.name: send_video
capabilities.description: Send a video to a chat.

capabilities.name: send_location
capabilities.description: Send a location point on the map.

capabilities.name: forward_message
capabilities.description: Forward a message from one chat to another.

capabilities.name: edit_message_text
capabilities.description: Edit the text of a previously sent message.

capabilities.name: delete_message
capabilities.description: Delete a message from a chat.

capabilities.name: get_updates
capabilities.description: Receive incoming updates using long polling.

capabilities.name: set_webhook
capabilities.description: Set a webhook URL to receive updates via HTTPS POST.

capabilities.name: get_chat_member_count
capabilities.description: Get the number of members in a chat.

capabilities.name: get_chat_member
capabilities.description: Get information about a chat member.

capabilities.name: answer_callback_query
capabilities.description: Answer a callback query from an inline keyboard button press.

capabilities.name: send_chat_action
capabilities.description: Send a chat action indicator (typing, uploading, etc).
